summary: SOX Section 404 Wizard (E2) testing completed successfully. All 28 backend tests pass. Frontend SOX Wizard page fully functional with all features working: page loads, domain cards, controls accordion, update dialog, PDF export, and auditor summary.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly
Console warnings about span inside select/option - React hydration warning, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: All 28 pytest tests pass (including 4 SOX wizard tests)
Backend: GET /api/sox/controls returns 20 controls grouped in 5 domains
Backend: PATCH /api/sox/controls/{id} updates control and creates audit log
Backend: GET /api/sox/report returns structured JSON with overall_status and controls_summary
Backend: GET /api/sox/report/pdf returns valid PDF (application/pdf content-type)
Frontend: SOX Wizard page loads at /dashboard/sox-wizard with title 'SOX Section 404 Wizard'
Frontend: Subtitle shows 'Internal Controls Assessment over Financial Reporting'
Frontend: Overall progress bar shows 4/20 controls completed — 20% ready for audit
Frontend: 5 domain summary cards display (Access Control 25%, Change Management 25%, IT Operations 25%, Data Integrity 25%, Security 0%)
Frontend: Controls accordion expands/collapses and shows 20 controls with correct data
Frontend: Each control row shows ID, title, status badge, risk level, assignee, due date
Frontend: Update button opens edit dialog with status select, evidence textarea, assignee input, due date picker
Frontend: Saving control update via dialog calls PATCH API and shows success toast
Frontend: Export Report PDF button downloads PDF file
Frontend: Generate Full Report button in auditor summary also triggers PDF download
Frontend: Sidebar navigation shows 'SOX 404' entry between Compliance and ARIA with ClipboardCheck icon
Frontend: Auditor summary panel shows Fiscal Year 2026, Overall Status NOT READY, Overall Progress 4/20 (20%)
Frontend: Overall status correctly shows 'NOT READY' when < 50%
Frontend: Due dates in red when overdue (visible in UI)
seed_data_creation: SOX controls seeded via /app/backend/seed.py: 20 controls in 5 domains (Access Control, Change Management, IT Operations, Data Integrity, Security). Status distribution: 4 completed, 10 in_progress, 4 not_started, 2 failed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SOX Section 404 Wizard (E2) is complete. The wizard page at /dashboard/sox-wizard provides full CRUD for 20 SOX controls across 5 domains. PDF export works for admin/dpo roles. Update dialog uses native HTML select/textarea/input (not Shadcn components). The overall_pct with 4/20 completed = 20%, which shows 'NOT READY' status. Previous iteration_4.json tested E1 SOX Foundation.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/sox/controls: Returns 20 controls grouped by 5 domains with completion percentages
backend_endpoints.PATCH /api/sox/controls/{id}: Updates control status/evidence/assignee/due_date, creates audit log
backend_endpoints.GET /api/sox/report: Returns JSON with overall_status, overall_pct, controls_summary, domains
backend_endpoints.GET /api/sox/report/pdf: Returns PDF file with SOX 404 assessment report

frontend_components.SoxWizardPage: Main wizard page with progress bar, domain cards, controls accordion, auditor summary
frontend_components.Edit Dialog: Modal with status select, evidence textarea, assignee input, due date picker
frontend_components.Export buttons: Two buttons - header 'Export Report PDF' and summary 'Generate Full Report'
